nodes.description: By the end of the year, read and comprehend literary nonfiction in the grades 6–8 text complexity band proficiently, with scaffolding as needed at the high end of the range.
nodes.subdomain: Reading Standards for Informational Text

nodes.title: Analyze how two or more authors writing about the same topic shape their pres...
nodes.description: Analyze how two or more authors writing about the same topic shape their presentations of key information by emphasizing different evidence or advancing different interpretations of facts.

academic_standards.description: Analyze how two or more authors writing about the same topic shape their presentations of key information by emphasizing different evidence or advancing different interpretations of facts.

nodes.title: Trace and evaluate the argument and specific claims in a text, assessing whet...
nodes.description: Trace and evaluate the argument and specific claims in a text, assessing whether the reasoning is sound and the evidence is relevant and sufficient to support the claims.

academic_standards.description: Trace and evaluate the argument and specific claims in a text, assessing whether the reasoning is sound and the evidence is relevant and sufficient to support the claims.

nodes.title: Compare and contrast a text to an audio, video, or multimedia version of the ...
nodes.description: Compare and contrast a text to an audio, video, or multimedia version of the text, analyzing each medium's portrayal of the subject (e.g., how the delivery of a speech affects the impact of the words).
nodes.subdomain: Reading Standards for Informational Text

academic_standards.description: Compare and contrast a text to an audio, video, or multimedia version of the text, analyzing each medium's portrayal of the subject (e.g., how the delivery of a speech affects the impact of the words).

nodes.title: Determine an author's point of view or purpose in a text and analyze how the ...
nodes.description: Determine an author's point of view or purpose in a text and analyze how the author distinguishes his or her position from that of others.

academic_standards.description: Determine an author's point of view or purpose in a text and analyze how the author distinguishes his or her position from that of others.

nodes.title: Analyze the structure an author uses to organize a text, including how the ma...

nodes.title: Determine the meaning of words and phrases as they are used in a text, includ...

nodes.subdomain: Reading Standards for Informational Text

nodes.description: Analyze the interactions between individuals, events, and ideas in a text (e.g., how ideas influence individuals or events, or how individuals influence ideas or events).
